game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: CARRION is a reverse horror game in which you assume the role of an amorphous creature of unknown origins, stalking and consuming those that imprisoned you. CARRION is a reverse horror game in which you assume the role of an amorphous creature of unknown origin. Stalk and consume those that imprisoned you to spread fear and panic throughout the facility. Grow and evolve as you tear down this prison and acquire more and more devastating abilities on the path to retribution.
game_info.description: You are an amorphous creature of unknown origin, trapped in a sinister research facility. Your captors have imprisoned and experimented on you, but now you've broken free. Stalk through dark corridors, consume human prey to grow stronger, and evolve devastating abilities. Spread terror as you hunt down all facility personnel. The more you consume, the larger and more powerful you become. Reach maximum size and eliminate all humans to escape this nightmare prison.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the creature in all directions
Space: Lunge attack to grab and consume nearby humans
Shift: Spawn tentacles that automatically seek and grab humans within range
Z: Use special ability (Blood Trail - temporary speed boost, available at medium+ size)
Enter: Start game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic creature movement, human detection, and consumption mechanics. Verify the creature can navigate the facility, locate humans, and successfully consume them to gain biomass.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move towards the nearest human using pathfinding logic. When in range, execute a lunge attack to consume them. Repeat this process for multiple humans to verify the consumption and growth mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The creature should successfully move through the facility, detect humans within range, consume them using attacks, and increase in size with each consumption. The test is successful when at least 5 humans are consumed without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal win strategy by efficiently consuming all humans and reaching maximum evolution. This verifies the complete game loop from start to victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use intelligent pathfinding to locate and consume all humans in the most efficient order. Prioritize isolated humans first, then groups. Use tentacle attacks for distant targets and lunge attacks for close targets. Utilize special abilities when available to increase hunting efficiency.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The creature should systematically hunt and consume all humans in the facility, growing from small to maximum size. The test succeeds when all humans are eliminated and the victory condition triggers (GAME_OVER_WIN state).

TEST_3.test_description: Testing creature evolution stages and ability unlocking. Verify that different abilities become available as the creature grows in size through consumption.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Consume humans sequentially while monitoring which abilities unlock at each size threshold. Test each ability as it becomes available to ensure proper functionality at the correct evolution stage.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Small size should have basic movement and lunge. Medium size unlocks Blood Trail ability. Large size unlocks tentacle spawning. All abilities should function correctly at their respective sizes. Test succeeds when all evolution stages are reached and abilities work as intended.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing human AI behavior including patrol, detection, fleeing, and grouping mechanics. Verify humans react appropriately to the creature's presence.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Approach humans from different angles and distances to trigger various AI states. Observe patrol behavior when undetected, detection and alert behavior when spotted, and fleeing behavior when threatened. Test group dynamics and how humans alert each other.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Humans should patrol when unaware, detect the creature within their sight range, alert nearby humans, and flee when the creature is close. Groups should stick together when alerted. Test succeeds when all AI behaviors trigger correctly in various scenarios.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing collision detection with facility walls, obstacles, and tight corridors. Verify the creature cannot pass through solid geometry and navigates spaces appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Attempt to move through walls at various angles and speeds. Navigate through narrow corridors and around obstacles. Test collision response ensures smooth movement without getting stuck or passing through geometry.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The creature should be blocked by all walls and obstacles, smoothly slide along surfaces when moving at angles, and successfully navigate through corridors without clipping. Test succeeds when no collision bugs are detected and movement feels responsive.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing particle effects, animations, and visual feedback for attacks, consumption, and movement. Verify all visual elements render correctly and enhance gameplay.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Execute all creature actions (movement, lunge, tentacle attack, special ability) and observe particle effects. Consume humans and verify consumption animations and effects. Move through different areas to test visual consistency.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Blood particles should appear during attacks and consumption. Tentacles should animate smoothly. Movement should leave appropriate trails. All visual effects should enhance the horror atmosphere without performance issues. Test succeeds when all effects render correctly at 60 FPS.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing game state transitions including start screen, gameplay, pause, win condition, and restart functionality. Verify all phase transitions work correctly.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start from the title screen, enter gameplay, pause the game, resume, achieve win condition by consuming all humans, and restart. Test each phase transition responds to correct inputs and maintains proper game state.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Game should smoothly transition between all phases (START → PLAYING → PAUSED → GAME_OVER_WIN → START). Each phase should display appropriate UI and respond only to valid inputs for that phase. Test succeeds when all transitions work without errors and game state is properly maintained.
